name: USP消音版 | 无声一击
descriptionEn: A fan favorite from Counter-Strike Source, the Silenced USP Pistol has a detachable silencer that gives shots less recoil while suppressing attention-getting noise. It has been custom painted with black and blue geometric symbols and shurikens. Exercise discretion while executing aggression
descriptionZh: 从《反恐精英：起源》中穿越而来，是玩家们的最爱，消音版 USP 手枪装有一个可拆卸的消音器，降低后坐力的同时还能抑制住容易引起注意的枪声。 它定制涂装了黑色和蓝色的几何符号与手里剑。 锋芒内敛，一击制敌
